__fixture__.name: knowledge_worker_quarantine
__fixture__.scenario: An index worker crashes three times inside the medium window while ingesting a malformed semantic-graph input. The supervisor has already observed two prior exits; this fourth escalation packet lifts escalation_state from degraded to quarantined. The search and graph surfaces project partial state with a repair path; the shell continues typing and saving with no freshness claim on affected shards. Authority envelopes are revoked before any future rehydrate; automatic restart is paused until the user or local admin explicitly resumes.

heartbeat_snapshot.note: Worker heartbeated before each crash; cause is ingest data, not liveness.

resource_snapshot.note: Maintenance-lane depth was above the constrained band; worker was reading a repeatedly-rejected semantic-graph input.

capability_envelope_snapshot.note: Worker held search and semantic-graph authority envelopes; both revoked on quarantine.

contract_versions.note: RPC contract is current; cause is input data.

last_good_checkpoint.note: Hot-set checkpoint preserved; rehydrate on resume restarts from this epoch and rebuilds the rejected graph shard.

degraded_state_lineage.note: First crash at 18:14:22; supervisor respawns the worker.
Second crash inside the short window; surfaces mark search and graph degraded with a repair path.
Third crash in the medium window exhausts the budget (3 restarts / 30 s); automatic restart paused.

revoked_tickets.note: Consumers receive resync_required with host_restart; search surfaces project partial with a repair hint.
Semantic-graph subscription revoked; graph surface projects partial.
Worker capability envelope revoked; re-issued on user-resume only after policy admission.

emergency_action_linkage.note: No emergency action gated the quarantine; cause is repeated ingest failure on a specific graph shard.

workspace_scope.note: Worker is scoped to the workspace; no execution context is bound because it is a background knowledge-maintenance worker.

summary: Index worker exhausted its restart budget (3 crashes in 30 s); supervisor escalates from degraded to quarantined, revokes search and graph authority envelopes, and pauses automatic restart until the user or admin explicitly resumes.
